code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best_start = 0
  mut best_len = 0

  while i < n
    mut b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    while i < n and is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    end
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    end
    let len = i - start
    if len > best_len
      best_len = len
      best_start = start
    end
  end

  let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  println("longest=#{word}")
end
